work.name: Stormlight Labs
work.summary: Lead Engineer of a mental health & open-source focused startup, architecting scalable systems and leading development from concept to production.
highlights: Translated complex technical and product requirements into intuitive, performant, and maintainable software solutions grounded in research and user feedback

Developed and optimized multi-platform applications and open-source libraries using Svelte, Rust, Go, and Flutter, applying modern software design patterns, concurrency models, and profiling for high reliability and performance

work.name: Edlink
work.summary: Technical lead and project manager for Flow, a data pipeline connecting LMS to SIS providers for schools.
highlights: Adapted new data model to the API, as well as connectors for new integrations
Built and designed novel system architecture around PubSub and BigQuery, and Cloud functions
NestJS (with TypeScript) and Postgres in a Kubernetes cluster on GCP with Redis. Dashboard built with Vue

work.name: CampusOptics
work.summary: Independently gathered requirements from customers and management to develop new features for a higher education Environmental Health and Safety SaaS.
highlights: Built features for a React Native application while adding endpoints to the internal API
Complete Stack: Redis for Sidekiq, Ruby on Rails monolith, and Postgres deployed to AWS Elastic Container Service

work.name: Texas Advanced Computing Center
work.summary: Architected the Frontera User Portal, the first implementation of the Core Experience Portal v2.
highlights: Built with React, Django, and Postgres
Developed SEO optimization strategy and publication pipeline update on DesignSafe-CI
Advocated for and improved internal testing practices and implemented Pytest for Core V2

projects.name: Volkara
highlights: Deployed a local-first SvelteKit application using PGlite and Drizzle, achieving sub-100 ms offline UX with deterministic data consistency
Designed and implemented a premium sync engine with queued operations, SHA-256 diffing, and a network-aware worker
Unified observability across web and worker contexts via session-scoped & GDPR compliant telemetry

projects.name: Beacon
projects.description: Python Type Checker and Language Server
highlights: Architected Rust-based LSP implementation with Hindley-Milner type inference engine
Implemented comprehensive code intelligence including real-time diagnostics and type narrowing via control flow analysis
Built refactoring suite with workspace-wide renaming validation and automated quick fixes
Designed incremental analysis architecture with multi-layer caching supporting VS Code, Zed, Neovim, and Helix

projects.name: Big Fly
highlights: Built RESTful API with Go and PostgreSQL serving historical data from Lahman Database and Retrosheet
Implemented advanced analytics including win probability calculations from 2,143 unique game states
Designed trigger-maintained search vectors with GIN/trigram indexes enabling sub-millisecond queries
Architected ETL pipeline with materialized views and comprehensive Swagger/OpenAPI documentation

projects.name: Lazurite
highlights: Built Flutter/Dart mobile client for iOS and Android with Material 3 design
Implemented AT Protocol features including timelines, feeds, post composition, moderation tools, and account switching
Designed Drift-backed local cache with offline-aware screens, drafts, saved posts, and semantic search

projects.name: Marker
projects.description: Ad-free mobile browser for reading and annotating
highlights: Built Flutter/Dart browser with WebView-based text selection, highlighting, underlining, and note creation
Implemented persistent annotations using layered W3C-inspired selectors for graceful anchoring across DOM changes
Designed local-first state architecture with Riverpod, Drift/SQLite, go_router, and injected JavaScript bridge

projects.name: markdownz
projects.description: CommonMark-compliant Markdown parser and event API
highlights: Built Zig Markdown engine with AST-first and pull-event APIs for renderers, formatters, and low-allocation integrations
Implemented CommonMark and GitHub Flavored Markdown parsing with HTML rendering and URL sanitization controls
Validated parser behavior against vendored CommonMark and GFM conformance corpora

projects.name: Noteleaf
highlights: Architected terminal-native productivity system combining task management, note-taking, and media tracking
Implemented repository pattern with SQLite persistence and Cobra CLI framework
Built article parser with Colly and goquery for web scraping
